primary_variables.matched_definition: Base or amino-acid substitution (for example SNV, point mutation, engineered missense).
evidence: The interactome of myopathic S85C and ALS-variant F115C MATR3 were virtually identical to WT protein.
We generated WT-MATR3:AviTag, S85C-MATR3:AviTag, and F115C-MATR3:AviTag expression vectors and transfected these constructs into HEK 293 cells.

primary_variables.matched_definition: Permanent loss of function through full gene knockout (for example CRISPR KO or deletion).
evidence: Deletion of RNA recognition motif (RRM1) or Zn finger motifs (ZnF1 or ZnF2) diminished the binding of a subset of MATR3 interacting proteins.
Remarkably, deletion of the RRM2 motif caused enhanced binding of >100 hundred proteins.
Through analysis of MATR3 proteins with deletions in conserved RNA recognition motifs (RRMs) and Zn finger motifs (ZnFs), we revealed a crucial role of the RRM2 motif

attributes.agent: MATR3 variants (WT, S85C, F115C, ΔRRM1, ΔRRM2, ΔZnF1, ΔZnF2)
evidence: HEK 293 cells were transfected with wild-type and mutated Avi-tagged plasmids
Twenty-four hours post transfection, the cells were rinsed three times with 1x PBS and then harvested by scraping.

replicate_hints: Data from five replicate control samples was compared to data from four replicates of samples from affinity capture with WT-MATR3-Avi, three replicates of capture with S85C-MATR3:AviTag, and three replicates of capture with S85C- or F115C-MATR3:AviTag.

evidence: the change in abundance was determined by the ratio of the total number of identified MS/MS spectra for a particular protein between the wild-type MATR3 and mutated MATR3 samples.

contrast_hints.case_label: MATR3 deletion mutants (ΔRRM1, ΔRRM2, ΔZnF1, ΔZnF2)
evidence: In assessing the relative binding of these proteins to each of 4 deletion mutants, we normalized the spectral counts

targets_and_enrichments.ontology_label: Affinity purification coupled with mass spectrometry proteomics

base_candidates_ranked.reason: The experiment used a Q-Exactive mass spectrometer for shotgun proteomics with label-free spectral counting for relative abundance determination.

modifier_candidates_ranked.reason: The study explicitly used affinity capture (AviTag/Streptavidin beads) to identify interacting proteins (interactome analysis).
